role_summary: the accounts manager manages daily accounting operations, ensuring accurate records and  timely reporting.
responsibilities: • supervise accounting entries  and ledger maintenance   • manage accounts payable and receivable   • ensure timely bank reconciliations   • support month -end and year -end closures   • assist in statutory compliance and audits   • maintain accounting documentation and controls
qualifications: • ca w ith hands -on accounting experience   • strong accounting principles knowledge   • erp and excel proficiency
